name: Hot'n' Spicy Chicken Wings W/Blue Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat together all of the dip ingredients until blended. Set aside.
2. Remove the tips from the wings and discard. Separate the first and second joints of the wings with a sharp knife.
3. Pat the wings dry with paper towels.
4. Heat about 2 inches of oil to 350°F in a heavy saucepan on a deep-frying thermometer.
5. Fry the wings, a few at a time, for about 6 minutes, until golden brown on all sides.
6. Drain on paper towels.
7. In a small bowl, mix the butter, catsup and Tabasco sauce.
8. Toss the wings in the butter mixture to coat thoroughly.
9. Serve hot, and pass the dip and celery sticks.
